title: Farinet ou l'or dans la montagne
writer: Charles A. Brun, Max Haufler, Charles Ferdinand Ramuz
actors: Jean-Louis Barrault, Suzy Prim, André Alerme
plot: Maurice Farinet, a young Swiss peasant, has found a gold deposit in the mountains and starts producing counterfeit money. He is arrested but manages to escape. The village people are on his side and shelter him. Arrested a second ...
